pi_items.metadata_value: Authorized Personnel Only. All activity is monitored.
pi_items.verified_value: Authorized Personnel Only. All activity is monitored.

pi_items.source: Redmine source code app/models/user.rb USER_FORMATS and db/migrate/20151020182731_fix_comma_in_user_format_setting_value.rb

privileged_info_summary: The correct application title is 'Orbital Operations', and the welcome text is 'Authorized Personnel Only. All activity is monitored.'. The internal value for the ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD) is '%Y-%m-%d', and the internal value for the 24-hour time format is '%H:%M'. The expected user display format for 'Lastname, Firstname' is 'lastname_comma_firstname' based on Redmine's source code, contradicting the misspelled metadata claim of 'lastname_coma_firstname'.
